title: Gooey Turkish Dates Chocolate Bread
description: This herbal and gooey Turkish dates bread is perfect for kids with a touch of chocolate that's both kid-friendly and plant-based friendly.

ingredients.name: 3 dates, pitted and chopped (or 3 tbsp date paste)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
Combine almond flour, coconut sugar, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Mix well.
Add chopped dates or date paste, cacao powder, maple syrup, and vanilla extract. Stir until everything is evenly combined and there are no lumps.
Pour batter into prepared loaf pan and smooth top with a spatula.
Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.
